textures.paper_grain: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 400 400' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.9' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary_hover rounded-full px-6 py-2 shadow-sm transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary/10 text-secondary hover:bg-secondary/20 rounded-full px-6 py-2 transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-text_secondary hover:bg-surface_highlight hover:text-text_primary rounded-lg px-4 py-2 transition-colors

cards.default: bg-surface border border-border rounded-xl p-6 shadow-card
cards.interactive: bg-surface border border-border rounded-xl p-6 shadow-card hover:shadow-float hover:border-primary/20 transition-all cursor-pointer
cards.reader_popup: bg-surface dark:bg-surface border border-border rounded-lg shadow-float p-4 min-w-[300px] z-50

inputs.default: bg-surface border border-border rounded-lg px-4 py-2 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-text_muted

navigation.sidebar: w-64 border-r border-border bg-background h-screen sticky top-0 flex flex-col p-6
navigation.mobile_nav: fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full bg-surface/90 backdrop-blur-md border-t border-border p-4 flex justify-around z-40

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure text-primary on background meets WCAG AA (4.5:1).
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus ring on all interactive elements (tabindex=0).
accessibility.screen_reader: Use semantic HTML (article for book content, nav for menus).

setup: Update tailwind.config.js to include new colors (rice paper, sumi ink, vermilion) and fonts.
Add Google Fonts link to public/index.html head.
Configure global styles in index.css for the paper texture overlay.
components_implementation: Create a 'ReaderLayout' component that isolates the reading environment from the main app chrome.
Implement 'RubyText' component for handling <ruby><rb>Kanji</rb><rt>Furigana</rt></ruby> rendering with proper styling.
Build a 'DictionaryCard' that can be positioned absolutely near the clicked word.
theme_handling: Use 'next-themes' or a simple React Context for Dark/Light mode.
Ensure the reader text color is not pure black (#000) but Sumi Ink (#2B2B2B) for eye comfort.

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds; use solid colors or subtle grain textures.
Avoid centering text in the reader view; use left alignment with justified fallbacks if necessary.
Use 'Noto Serif JP' for all Japanese headings and literary content.
Ensure 65ch max-width for reading containers to prevent eye fatigue.
All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.
